strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and developer tooling expertise, including testing frameworks and CI/CD
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in context of enterprise automation tooling
No clear demonstration of direct experience with Kotlin, Java, or PostgreSQL in recent roles
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may hinder collaboration in a Berlin-based enterprise environment
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep full-stack experience with core stack technologies, strong engineering discipline, and relevant AI-agent work that aligns closely with the role’s focus on internal tooling and automation, though gaps in specific secondary stack components and language proficiency warrant closer evaluation.
